title: PopCurrent
summary: A live viral-news and culture site built to package trending internet stories into fast-moving editorial campaigns.
description: PopCurrent is one of Phil's clearest public AI publishing products: a trend-focused news surface designed for fast editorial packaging, social distribution, and attention-aware story framing.

The live site positions itself around trending stories, viral content, and breaking internet culture. Phil also used it as an experimental publishing engine for Reddit-native sci-fi storytelling campaigns, including The Gifts of Stillness and the later Stillness Rejected and Loranthi reveal threads.
The codebase lives in a private repository, so CivFolio treats GitHub metadata as optional enrichment and presents PopCurrent primarily through its public product surface and outcomes.

media.alt: The PopCurrent social preview image from the live site.
media.caption: PopCurrent's live brand surface for viral stories, trending culture, and editorial experiments.

media.alt: An observatory city representing the PopCurrent project.
media.caption: A frontier editorial city tuned for trend cycles, social hooks, and high-speed publishing.

greatWorks.title: Viral Editorial Engine
greatWorks.summary: A fast publishing loop for trend-driven stories, social framing, and internet-native editorial packaging.

greatWorks.title: The Gifts of Stillness
greatWorks.summary: A Reddit-native sci-fi hoax/storytelling campaign that helped prove the product's reach and narrative packaging power.

highlights: Built a live trend-and-viral publishing surface under the PopCurrent brand.
Used the system to publish Reddit-native sci-fi hoax/storytelling campaigns, including The Gifts of Stillness and the Stillness Rejected/Loranthi reveal follow-up.
Shows Phil's product instinct for packaging AI and editorial systems into something public, legible, and culturally tuned.
productionQueue: Refine editorial controls for narrative series and campaign-style publishing.
Improve sourcing, moderation, and curation loops for live trend coverage.
Deepen the connection between PopCurrent, Robot Future, and Phil's broader public-media stack.

architectureNotes: Designed as a public-facing editorial product rather than a repo-first demo.
Balances productized publishing workflows with experimental narrative campaigns and fast content iteration.
